arts.ttl: Amanda Staveley shows true colours with Newcastle United statement amid Spurs takeover decision
arts.sum: Speaking to ITV for their documentary All With Smiling Faces, Staveley admitted she feels part of a'special Newcastle family'. Those could include an investment in one of United's Premier League rivals, with talks having taken place with Tottenham Hotspur over potential involvement.

arts.ttl: DGW32 stats: More than 400,000 Triple-Captain Isak
arts.sum: More than 412,000 Fantasy Premier League managers have Triple-Captained Alexander Isak (£9.5m) for Double Gameweek 32 (DGW32), the 10th-highest total of all time. Triple Captain is the most-used chip for DGW32, played by over 447,000 managers overall, with 92 per cent of them selecting Isak.

arts.ttl: Greenwood’s Marseille form has BIG transfer implications for Man Utd as Barcelona watch on
arts.sum: Greenwood’s display was described thus: “As gifted as he can be – when he wants to be, and that’s increasingly rare – the former Man Utd player exasperates with his lack of seriousness. Greenwood’s Marseille form has HUGE transfer implications for Man Utd as Barcelona watch on

arts.ttl: Man Utd plot £200m summer transfer war chest by cashing in on FOUR Old Trafford stars
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE: Ruben Amorim will be tasked with overhauling his Manchester United squad this summer and could have a huge sum of money at his disposal to help him do so

arts.ttl: Man United have keen interest in 22-year-old who has previously turned them down
arts.sum: Manchester United are on signing the Parma goalkeeper Zion Suzuki at the end of the season. The 22-year-old has been linked with the move to Manchester United in the past, and a report from UnitedinFocus claims that the player has previously turned them down so that he can continue his development with regular football. Suzuki […] The post Man United have keen interest in 22-year-old who has previously turned them down appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Man United's £62m target Matheus Cunha hits out at Wolves fan channel over deleted post on Instagram which declared he would 'follow his dreams'
arts.sum: Cunha has been in red-hot form this season, scoring 15 goals in 29 games across all competitions, and he is all but certain to move on this summer.

arts.ttl: Man United's worst-ever Premier League season could be confirmed at St James' Park on Sunday
arts.sum: Manchester United must be victorious in each of their final seven league matches of the 2024-25 campaign in order to beat their previous lowest tally in a Premier League season.

arts.ttl: Jason Tindall: Eddie Howe’s ‘Mad Dog’ assistant who ‘doesn’t give a s***’ what people think
arts.sum: Eddie Howe will miss Newcastle's Premier League game against Manchester United on Sunday due to illness and responsibility has therefore fallen on assistant manager Jason Tindall

arts.ttl: All change at Chelsea, Man Utd and Liverpool after €110m deal
arts.sum: Juventus are confident that they will be able to keep Kenan Yildiz and Andrea Cambiaso after a fresh injection of cash from their owners, according to Italian media. Due to their lavish spending last year, it had been thought that Juventus would have to make some potentially painful sacrifices this summer, with the likes of Kenan Yildiz and Andrea Cambiaso among the players attracting attention.

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney Named His Greatest 11 of Manchester United Teammates
arts.sum: Wayne Rooney once named a Manchester United XI made up of the best teammates during his time at Old Trafford.
